attributes.action: STOP Alder hey Children’s Hospital Liverpool from closing down ward 4C
attributes.additional_details:
STOP Alder hey Children’s Hospital Liverpool from closing down ward 4C.
Ward 4C is a general paediatric ward in the hospital and they are wanting to close it.. only given the staff 8 weeks notice. Up to 75 staff will either loss there job or be deployed around the NHS. WARD 4C is not juat a ward it is a family to all the staff but the patients and parents on the ward.
Its not juat a ward its a family we need to save xx
attributes.background: STOP Alder hey Children’s Hospital Liverpool from closing down Ward 4C it is a general paediatric ward in the hospital and they are wanting to close WARD 4C ITS NOT JUST A WARD ITS A FAMILY PLEASE HELP STOP THIS

rejection.details: This is an operational matter for the NHS, not a decision for the Government or UK Parliament.
